_doc: 博弈遊戲開發商庫 + 招牌機制 + 遊戲分類法。games 軌每輪從 Slotslaunch /api/providers 或 SlotCatalog 過濾重新推導供應商清單(自動接住新工作室),用此庫給候選遊戲的『供應商血統』加權、並對照招牌機制找值得復刻的新互動。last_verified 過期則重查。

providers.name: Pragmatic Play
providers.known_for: 最多產 slot;Gates of Olympus/Sweet Bonanza/Sugar Rush/Dog House。招牌 tumble+pays-anywhere+scatter-pay+大乘數 orbs、Ante Bet、bonus-buy;另有 live/game-show(Mega Wheel/Sweet Bonanza CandyLand)

providers.name: Hacksaw Gaming
providers.known_for: crypto casino 寵兒、高能量行動優先;Wanted Dead or a Wild/Le Bandit/Chaos Crew/RIP City。簡單網格+殘暴 max-win、scatter/instant-win、超紅 bonus-buy

providers.name: Nolimit City
providers.known_for: 極端波動王、最狠主題與數學;Mental/Fire in the Hole xBomb/San Quentin。專有 xWays/xNudge/xSplit/xBomb 擴張符號 + 層疊 bonus-buy

providers.name: Push Gaming
providers.known_for: 特色豐富高波、質感佳;Razor Shark/Jammin' Jars(cluster+collection)。collect-and-persist 乘數 + mystery respin

providers.name: Play'n GO
providers.known_for: 老牌大眾市場;Book of Dead 定義 book 擴張符號類、Reactoonz(cluster/quantum)。穩定月產

providers.name: NetEnt
providers.known_for: 定義類經典(Evolution 旗下);Starburst(雙向擴張 wild)/Gonzo's Quest(發明 Avalanche/cascade)/Divine Fortune(progressive)。質感與 iconic 簡潔標竿

providers.name: Relax Gaming
providers.known_for: Money Train 系列(bonus-buy + hold&spin 持久符號大乘數)/Temple Tumble;擁 Dream Drop progressive、聚合第三方 Silver Bullet 工作室

providers.name: Big Time Gaming (BTG)
providers.known_for: 發明 Megaways(324–117,649 ways)與 Megaclusters、授權給數百工作室;Bonanza/White Rabbit/Extra Chilli。開創 feature-drop/bonus-buy

providers.name: Evolution
providers.known_for: live-dealer + game-show 霸主;Crazy Time/Monopoly Live/Funky Time/Lightning Roulette/Mega Ball。擁 NetEnt/Red Tiger/BTG/Nolimit City

providers.name: Spribe
providers.known_for: crash/instant 之王;Aviator 定義 crash 品類(新興市場)、mini-games(Mines/Dice/Goal/Plinko/Hi-Lo)。可驗證公平、多人社交 crash

providers.name: Stake (Originals)
providers.known_for: 20+ 可驗證公平 originals:Crash/Dice/Limbo/Mines/Plinko/Keno/Wheel/Hilo/Dragon Tower。多數 crypto casino originals 的抄襲藍本(ApexWin 引擎藍本)

providers.name: BGaming
providers.known_for: crypto 友善 slot + 可驗證公平 originals(Plinko/Dice/Mines)、bonus-buy slot(Elvis Frog)。slot 可驗證公平先行者

providers.name: ELK Studios
providers.known_for: 行動優先、獨特美術與下注策略;Cygnus/Nitropolis(擴張網格)、Pirots 系列(鳥在網格移動收集同色符號→逐步解鎖擴張格)。X-iter bonus-buy + 遞增乘數。Pirots 5 = 2026-07 BigWinBoard 10/10 旗艦

providers.name: Peter & Sons
providers.known_for: 古怪美術與敘事驅動 slot;Greedy Alice 系列(愛麗絲主題)。與 Hacksaw/AvatarUX 常聯名。中小工作室但機制實驗性高

providers.name: Iron Dog Studio
providers.known_for: 1x2 Network 旗下;Hold&Win 系 slot(Money Minecarts 等)。中波大眾市場

providers.name: Bullshark Games
providers.known_for: 新興工作室;collection/collector 主題(Clawsy Collector)。收集機制取向

providers.name: Slotmill
providers.known_for: 中型工作室;ways/主題 slot(Wild Bison Stampede 等)。中波大眾市場

providers.name: Red Tiger
providers.known_for: Daily Drops & Wins jackpots、質感中波 slot(Piggy Riches)。強網路 jackpot 工具(Evolution 旗下)

providers.name: Yggdrasil
providers.known_for: Vikings 系列創新;Valley of the Gods/Vikings Go Berzerk。GEM 引擎 + Gigablox(巨型符號塊)

providers.name: Thunderkick
providers.known_for: 古怪原創主題與機制;Esqueleto Explosivo/Midas Golden Touch。邪典美術

providers.name: Turbo Games / Onlyplay / Gamzix
providers.known_for: instant-game 量產工作室:Mines/Plinko/Dice/Goal/Balloon/Chicken 過馬路/penalty。crypto casino 常見

providers.name: Galaxsys
providers.known_for: 快回合 crash 與技巧遊戲(Rocketon/Fruit Blast/Ninja Crash),新興市場 crypto/social casino 流行

providers.name: Light & Wonder
providers.known_for: 陸機經典移植線上;88 Fortunes/Buffalo/Zeus。Hold & Spin(Lock it Link)+ ways-to-win 血統

providers.name: Aristocrat / Product Madness
providers.known_for: 全球 slot 機台龍頭;Buffalo/Lightning Link·Dragon Link hold-and-spin。定義 Lightning Link 式 hold&spin jackpot

providers.name: Wazdan
providers.known_for: 波動度切換、獨特玩家控件(Volatility Levels/Energy Saving Mode)。可配置特色大眾 slot

game_categories.examples: Gates of Olympus/Sweet Bonanza/Book of Dead/Bonanza Megaways/Razor Shark/Money Train 3/Wanted Dead or a Wild/Starburst
game_categories.notes: 量與營收最大類。子類:ways(Megaways)/cluster/scatter-pays-anywhere/固定 payline/grid 擴張/jackpot slot。可用符號網格+賠付表+HL.fair+特色觸發復刻,美術/動畫成本是主要工作量

game_categories.examples: Baccarat/Blackjack/Roulette/Sic Bo/Dragon Tiger/Pai Gow/Video Poker/Casino Hold'em/Teen Patti/Andar Bahar
game_categories.notes: RNG 桌遊(HL.table.betArea 易做)+ live-dealer(需視訊,純前端外)。Baccarat/Roulette 已有;Sic Bo/Dragon Tiger/Andar Bahar(亞洲)是同引擎自然下一步
純前端+可驗證公平復刻的甜蜜點——簡單數學、即時可驗、極少美術。單注映射 HL.instant。多人社交 crash(共享回合+即時 cashout 名單)是高工作量變體。已有 Dice/Limbo/Crash/Mines/Plinko/Keno/Towers

game_categories.examples: Crazy Time/Monopoly Live/Funky Time/Lightning Roulette/Mega Ball/Dream Catcher/Sweet Bonanza CandyLand
game_categories.notes: Evolution/Pragmatic 主導。真版需真人視訊,但機制(乘數段 money wheel + Cash Hunt/Pachinko/Coin Flip mini-game)可做成 RNG 單人 game-show 風——對比純 slot 是強差異化。wheel/乘數段格式為可複用核心

game_categories.examples: 刮刮卡/虛擬運動/Chicken mini/Ninja Crash·Rocketon 技巧/Fish Hunter 釣魚射擊/bingo/lottery/hold-and-win
game_categories.notes: 非標格式雜項。釣魚/射擊在亞洲極大。刮刮/instant-win 極易做。社群/同仁實驗遊戲(放置區)住這。適合展示可插拔 registry 差異化

signature_mechanics: Megaways — 每輪符號高度變動 324→117,649 ways,常配 cascade(BTG 發明、授權數百家)
Tumble/Cascade/Avalanche — 中獎符移除、新符掉入連鎖(Gonzo's Quest 發明;Gates/Sweet Bonanza/Sugar Rush 核心)
Cluster pays — 5+ 相鄰同符任意位置中獎、非固定線(Reactoonz/Jammin' Jars)
Hold & Spin/Respins — 可收集現金/jackpot 符鎖定並重置 respin 計數直到填滿(Money Train/88 Fortunes/Dragon Link)
Bonus-buy/Feature-buy — 付固定倍數(常 100x)直接進 bonus(Hacksaw/Nolimit/Relax 主打;部分市場禁)
擴張/walking/sticky wild(Starburst/Book of Dead/Dead or Alive)
243/1024 ways — 相鄰輪不論位置(Buffalo/Raging Rhino),Megaways 前身
乘數 orbs/遞增乘數 — 隨機乘數符在 tumble 上加/乘、特色內收集(Gates of Olympus/Wanted/ELK X-iter)
jackpot/bonus wheel — 轉段輪拿隨機現金或 jackpot 級獎(Mega Moolah/game-show money wheel)
wide-area/network progressive — 跨多家池化大獎(Mega Moolah/Dream Drop/Jackpot King)
xMechanics(Nolimit)— xWays/xNudge/xSplit/xBomb
乘數 money wheel + bonus mini-game — game-show 核心(Cash Hunt/Pachinko/Coin Flip)
scatter-pay/pays-anywhere — 8+ 同符任意位置賠(Pragmatic tumble 標配)
符號收集/持久 — 跨轉或特色間攜帶(Razor Shark mystery stacks/Jammin' Jars)
Gigablox/巨型符號塊(Yggdrasil/BTG Megaclusters)
cash-ladder/auto-cashout 曲線(crash)— 上升倍數趕在爆前 cashout(Aviator/Crash/Limbo/Balloon)
reveal-and-avoid 網格(Mines/Towers/Chicken)— 挑安全格複利、一錯即止
Ante-bet/feature-boost toggle — 加注提高 bonus 頻率/雙倍 scatter(Pragmatic Ante Bet)
符號收集網格 + 逐步擴張(ELK Pirots — 鳥角色在網格上移動、吃掉同色符號留空、集滿解鎖更大網格;對 ApexWin 是全新『網格 agent 移動+收集』互動維度,現有遊戲皆無)
乘數串接 concatenation(Hacksaw Dead By Noon Multiplier Chamber — 各輪頂端亮出 1–9 乘數,連成從最左起的連續線時『串接』相乘如 2·5·1→251x 而非相加;比一般乘數 orb 相加更刺激的張力機制)
